author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Resolved by adding f32 variants for the core distributions: random_f32, uniform_f32, standard_normal_f32, normal_f32, lognormal_f32, standard_exponential_f32, exponential_f32. Generator gains next_f32() to match next_f64(). Box-Muller generation for f32 normals is done in f64 and cast to f32 to preserve tail accuracy (matches NumPy's approach for dtype=np.float32). 18 new tests covering range, determinism, ND shapes, mean/variance, and error handling; all 145 lib tests + 12 property tests + 9 doctests pass. Ziggurat speedup for standard_normal is tracked separately as #442.
